allow: PowerShell(python --version; python "C:\\Users\\deivi\\.claude\\skills\\ui-ux-pro-max\\scripts\\search.py" "gym fitness bootcamp tactical military strength training landing page intense powerful" --design-system -p "Battle Ready Fitness")

PowerShell($ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $p = Get-Command python3.exe, python.exe, py.exe 2>$null | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty Source; if \($p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } else { Write-Output "NONE" })
Bash(python "C:\\Users\\deivi\\.claude\\skills\\ui-ux-pro-max\\scripts\\search.py" "fitness gym bold dark landing page" --design-system -f markdown)

Bash(sed -i 's|/images/\\\([a-z0-9]*\\\)\\.jpg|/images/\\1.webp|g' src/content/defaults.js src/content/schema.js src/pages/Schedule.jsx src/pages/Memberships.jsx src/components/ui/PageBanner.jsx index.html)
Bash(py scripts/search.py "gym fitness landing page dark industrial bold" --design-system)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse public -File | Sort-Object Length -Descending | Select-Object -First 25 @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}}, FullName)

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://battlereadyfitness.com' -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $js = [regex]::Match\($html, 'assets/index-[\\w-]+\\.js'\).Value; Write-Output "bundle: $js"; $bundle = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://battlereadyfitness.com/$js" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $url = [regex]::Match\($bundle, 'https://[a-z0-9]+\\.supabase\\.co'\).Value; Write-Output "supabase: $url"; $key = [regex]::Match\($bundle, 'eyJ[A-Za-z0-9_.-]{60,}'\).Value; Write-Output "anon key len: $\($key.Length\)"; $key | Out-File -Encoding ascii "$env:TEMP\\sbkey.txt")

PowerShell($urls = @\('1783886983765-swwrmr.webp','1783887560392-eptbrs.webp','1783890496117-v0mww5.webp','1784391585649-zg5uz7.webp','1784392189159-mpjxw8.webp','1784392322466-4wsldh.webp','1784392702596-ih7kbs.webp','1784392995190-qf3qm4.png','1784393665084-urt578.png','1784394103952-mkudhm.webp','1784395036181-32kdmq.webp','1784396257335-boeyuw.webp','1784396747817-i4hw4r.webp','1784397029474-jb3cpo.webp','1784397975823-9jehmy.webp','1784398057790-4kxwfq.webp','1784398112684-h1ufs0.webp','1784398302513-10ho1z.webp'\); $total = 0; foreach \($u in $urls\) { $full = "https://wqukiawyqihovkvxswyv.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/site-images/uploads/$u"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $full -Method Head -UseBasicParsing; $len = [int]$r.Headers['Content-Length']; $total += $len; Write-Output \("{0,8:N0} KB  {1}" -f \($len/1KB\), $u\) } catch { Write-Output "ERROR $u" } }; Write-Output \("TOTAL: {0:N1} MB" -f \($total/1MB\)\))

PowerShell($key = \(Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\sbkey.txt" -Raw\).Trim\(\); try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://wqukiawyqihovkvxswyv.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/site-images/uploads/rls-test.txt' -Method Post -Headers @{ apikey = $key; Authorization = "Bearer $key"; 'x-upsert' = 'true' } -ContentType 'text/plain' -Body 'test' -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output "PERMITIDO: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "BLOQUEADO: $\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__\)" })

PowerShell(foreach \($u in @\('1784392995190-qf3qm4.png','1784396747817-i4hw4r.webp'\)\) { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://wqukiawyqihovkvxswyv.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/site-images/uploads/$u" -Method Head -UseBasicParsing; Write-Output \("{0}: {1} KB, {2}" -f $u, [math]::Round\([int]$r.Headers['Content-Length']/1KB\), $r.Headers['Content-Type']\) })
